title: Finite Chebyshev-System Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Chebyshev separate duplicate-node, interpolation, and alternation QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite Chebyshev rows where exact replay computes the duplicate-node determinant as 0 while one row claims 1, computes p(1)=4 while another row claims 5, and computes common residual error 1/2 while another row claims 2/3; separate QF_LRA rows reject the fixed false claims through checked Farkas evidence.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional interpolation, alternation, or operator rows only when they add distinct exact-linear regression pressure; keep Haar, minimax, and infinite-dimensional theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite sample grids and polynomial bases as exact rational evaluation matrices.
Replay determinant, interpolation, and sign-pattern rows by deterministic exact arithmetic.
Keep degenerate sample-grid, false interpolation-sample, and false alternation-error replay separate from explicit checked QF_LRA/Farkas rows.
Keep Haar/Chebyshev-system theorems, minimax approximation, alternation theorems, and infinite-dimensional analysis marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
